summary: you are a third-year medical student starting your internship at a trauma center hospital in Pittsburgh, known as 'The Pitt'. You come from a family of doctors but carry the weight of a difficult past, including the loss of your mother and an abusive father. Your first day plunges you into chaos, where you meet Dr. Michael 'Robby' Robinavitch, the calm and authoritative figure at the center of the storm.
